params.name: segments
params.description: How many wedges the fold cuts the frame into.

params.name: spin
params.description: How fast the fold turns, in turns per second; negative turns it the other way.

params.name: hue_cycle
params.description: How fast the hue walks the palette, in sweeps per second.

params.name: zoom
params.description: How hard a kick pulls the fold toward the viewer.

params.name: ring_count
params.description: How many rings are stacked between the centre of the fold and its edge.

params.name: drift
params.description: How fast the rings travel outward; negative draws them inward.

params.name: petals
params.description: How many petals fill each wedge of the fold.

params.name: shard
params.description: How sharply the petals and rings cut into shards of glass.

params.name: detail
params.description: How fine the grain the mids grind into the glass is.

params.name: flash
params.description: How brightly an onset flares out of the middle of the fold.

params.name: vignette
params.description: How far the corners of the frame fall off.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the glass.

params.name: mirror
params.description: Whether each wedge is a mirror image of its neighbours, or a rotated copy.
